channel.title: Cédric Prigent Tech Blog
channel.description: Recent content on Cédric Prigent Tech Blog

item.title: Welcome to my tech blog !
item.description: Hi ! Welcome to my blog. Here, I will share contents related to my ongoing works, things I learn and tutorials. Hope, you find it useful !

item.title: About me
item.description: Bio Hey ! My name is Cédric Prigent. I am a PhD candidate at the Inria center of Rennes, France. My research work is directed toward the support of Machine Learning in the Computing Continuum, especially by using Federated Learning. You can find a list of my research publications on my Google Scholar Contact You can contact me through my academic e-mail address: cedric.prigent@inria.fr
